auto_inflate_enabled.description: Enable or disable automatic scaling of throughput units.

capacity.description: The capacity of the Event Hub namespace in throughput units.

dedicated_cluster_id.description: The ID of the dedicated cluster for the Event Hub namespace.

local_authentication_enabled.description: Enable or disable local authentication for the Event Hub namespace.

maximum_throughput_units.description: The maximum throughput units for the Event Hub namespace.

name.description: The name of the Event Hub namespace.

public_network_access_enabled.description: Enable or disable public network access to the Event Hub namespace.

sku.description: The SKU (pricing tier) of the Event Hub namespace.

tags.description: A map of tags to assign to the Event Hub namespace.

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.

location.description: Location that this resource will be created in. (e.g. eastus2, southeastasia)
